name: @live-lesson/creator-mcp-server
description: MCP server exposing rich chat card emit tools for the live-lesson creator app (todo / questions / verify). Result payloads flow through ccaas-core toolEventTriggers (configured with field: 'card' in solution.json) as `output_update` SSE events wrapped as `{ data: { field: 'card', value: <parsed> }, status }`. The browser's useAgentChat reads `payload.data.value` and routes on `value.kind` to the right card component.
